channel.title: Post-Quantum Cryptography on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Post-Quantum Cryptography on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Accelerating the quantum-safe timeline
item.description:
Microsoft says it is accelerating quantum-safe readiness and urging organizations to begin transitioning earlier as the perceived risk timeline shifts. The post is a brief announcement pointing readers to guidance on what can be done now.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
